compressed_prompt: convert sentence to email format, include 10 [placeholders] e.g., [name]
response:
Let's take a sentence and convert it into an email format with 10 placeholders. 

Original sentence: "Hello, I am going to meet John at the office on Friday at 2 PM to discuss the project details with the team."

Here's the email format with placeholders:

Subject: Meeting with [Team Lead] on [Day] at [Time]

Dear [Recipient Name],

I am writing to inform you that I will be meeting [Name] at [Location] on [Date] at [Time] to discuss the [Project Name] details with the [Department].

The meeting will be held in the [Meeting Room] and will cover key aspects of the [Project Description]. If you have any questions or need more information, please don't hesitate to contact me at [Email Address] or [Phone Number].

Best regards,
[Your Name]

The 10 placeholders used are:
1. [Team Lead]
2. [Day]
3. [Time]
4. [Name]
5. [Location]
6. [Date]
7. [Project Name]
8. [Department]
9. [Email Address]
10. [Your Name]
